description_long: This sculpture depicts a serene, robed human figure standing upright on a detailed, multi-tiered pedestal with an octagonal base. The figure holds a small object in its right hand, possibly a symbolic item, and its left arm is relaxed by its side. Flowing drapery is sculpted to suggest gentle movement, and the figure's hair is styled in a topknot. The pedestal features cut-out sections and stylized lotus petal motifs, adding to the ornamental quality. The surface appears to be made of weathered stone or concrete, giving it a muted, grayish tone. The overall form and iconography suggest influences from East Asian religious or cultural statuary.
description: A detailed stone or concrete sculpture of a robed human figure standing on an ornate, octagonal pedestal, holding a small object in one hand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal details of the robed figure, the object in its right hand, and the decorative pedestal.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the outstretched arm holding the object, and the layered base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure, the drapery, and the structure of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the figure's profile, the object in hand, and the pedestal's side details.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure holding a small object
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the background is plain and does not indicate an installation context.
